name: Shrimp in Garlic Sauce (Ital.)mcdonald (Vtdd24
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a medium saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring frequently.
3. Remove from heat and let cool.
4. Taste and season with salt and pepper.
5. Arrange prawns in a single layer in a baking dish.
6. Pour vermouth mixture over the prawns.
7. Let marinate at room temperature for 1 hour.
8. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
9. Bake prawns, basting once or twice, until pink and translucent, about 15-20 minutes.
10. Serve hot.
